data.name: Scarlett University
data.detailed_description:
STORY 

You'll cum for the sex but stay for the story. (But then quickly find more sex...it's a vicious cycle!)  

After being rejected by the prom-date-of-your-dreams, Scarlett University becomes your desperate attempt for validation that leads you down a steamy path of personal corruption. Here, you’ll discover life with your AURA–the SU exclusive vibrator that shapes and enhances your desire to fuck your way through life. Combine that with the sensual simulation department, and now you’ve got a messy recipe for sexually charged mayhem!

  • 9 core characters and over a dozen extras

  • ~10 hours of story content (100,000+ words)

  • Multiple endings

  • Voiced by some of your favorite NSFW voice actresses (including h-scenes!)

  • Replay your favorite moments and CGs with the gallery!

SEX SCENES

Beautiful hand drawn character art and CGs that cater to a wide range of fetishes and scenarios.

  • 50+ CGs (not including variations)

  • Solo female, MF, FF, MFF, MMF, MMFF, MFFFF, FMMMM+

  • Oral sex, Anal sex, Foot job, Tit job, Hand job, Cream pie

  • Sex toys

  • Lingerie + outfits

  • Public sex

  • BDSM

  • Machines

  • Femdom, Pegging

FULL LOVENSE TOY INTEGRATION 

Feel every thrust, buzz, suck, stroke and more!

Scarlett University was built from the ground up to be an immersive experience with your own Lovense toys. But what if I don't have a toy? Use your game controller instead! The vibration mirror feature allows you to feel it all. Play one handed or even hands-free so you can focus on the juicy parts!

Your education begins soon...

data.short_description: Scarlett University is an erotic visual novel adventure where the stakes are as high as the heels! Discover provocative machines and lusty opportunities at this elite all-girl finishing school. Connect your toys IRL. Are you being corrupted, or awakened? Just don't tell Mom what you're up to!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i-series 4000 or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX1080
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i-series 6000 or higher
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX1660ti
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
